The '''Samuac''' were a [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[New Kisge]]. Around [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], the [[Gender/Legends|male]] Samuac [[Sisquoc]] graduated from the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], where he was a record-setting student. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Samuac allied themselves with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], with the Alliance establishing its [[Delta Base]] on New Kisge.

==Biology and appearance==
The Samuac were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Sisar" />

==Society and culture==
Members of Samuac society identified as belonging to at least one—male—[[Gender/Legends|gender]].<ref name="Graduation">{{WEGCite|story=Graduation|book=Alliance Intelligence Reports}}</ref> The species shared its name with the spoken [[Language/Legends|language]] known as the [[Samuac Tree Code]]<ref name="Endor">{{GamerCite|9|Endor and the Moddell Sector}}</ref> as well as the entity known as the [[Samuac Sukeu]], with which<ref name="Graduation" /> the Samuac<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> [[Sisquoc]] was affiliated.<ref name="Graduation" />

==History==
The Samuac [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[New Kisge]]<ref name="Sisar" />—the surface of which featured [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]]<ref name="CRO11">{{JournalCite|11|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref>—of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chaasch]],<ref name="Sisar" /> situated in the [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Suolriep system/Legends|Suolriep system]]</ref> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Samuac allied themselves with the Alliance, which established one of its largest bases, [[Delta Base]], on their homeworld. The species was protected from retribution by the Empire due to the fact that it was relatively unknown in the Empire.<ref name="Sisar" />

==Samuac in the galaxy==
Around [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes that [[Sisquoc]] graduated from the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] approximately fourteen [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] prior to its setting, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the male<ref name="Graduation" /> Samuac Sisquoc was a student at the offworld [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. A member of what would become known as the [[Twilight Class]], he broke nearly every record set by the school's students. After the graduation of the Twilight Class, Sisquoc eventually became a member of the Rebel Alliance, in which he was one of the best trackers and [[Scout/Legends|scouts]], and recruited many of his classmates into the Alliance as well.<ref name="AIR" /> By [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> he had achieved the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|major]] and served with [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Samuac were introduced in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> In the book, the Samuac Sisquoc appeared in the short companion narrative "[[Graduation]]."<ref name="Graduation" />
